CEOs & PE Operating Partners
Designed for leaders responsible for execution, transformation, and value creation.

Execution Friction
Looks beyond employee sentiment to quantify organizational drag and operational risk.

01The Problem

Financial dashboards show what happened. Oprava shows what is quietly causing it.

Most companies can track revenue, costs, headcount, and EBITDA. But they cannot continuously see the execution friction building underneath the numbers, until the cost is already absorbed.

What leadership can see
Revenue$48.2M
EBITDA Margin18.4%
Headcount312
Sales Pipeline$12.1M
Projects On-Track68%
What is building beneath the numbers
Slow decision-makingHigh
approval_cycle: 14d avg · 3 layers deep
Impact · initiative delay risk
Unclear ownershipHigh
41% of initiatives lack a clear DRI
Impact · accountability leakage
Leadership bottlenecksCrit
3 teams route all decisions to the CEO
Impact · execution capacity ceiling
Transformation fatigueMed
change_readiness: −12 pts / 90d
Impact · stalled initiatives
Strategy not translatingMed
team-level execution gaps widening vs. plan
Impact · plan-to-actual drift
“

The cost of hidden friction is invisible, until it is already in the numbers.

02Why Now

Why now?

Companies are operating with more tools, more cross-functional dependencies, more data, and more pressure to execute faster. Yet leadership still lacks a reliable way to see where execution is slowing down before it shows up in the numbers.

Execution is more distributed

Critical work now moves across functions, systems, geographies, vendors, and leadership layers.

Signals are fragmented

The data exists, but it is scattered across tools, surveys, dashboards, meetings, and operational workflows.

Financial impact appears late

By the time friction shows up in missed targets or margin pressure, the organization has already lost time and value.

10The Platform

Oprava turns operating signals into measurable execution risk intelligence.

Oprava connects organizational signals across systems, teams, workflows, and leadership structures to identify where execution is slowing, why it is happening, and what it may cost.

01 / CONNECT

Ingest Signals

Designed to ingest signals from the operating systems companies already use, or through structured assessments.

02 / DETECT

Map Friction Patterns

Identify recurring patterns across decisions, ownership, alignment, coordination, and leadership flow.

03 / QUANTIFY

Score Execution Risk

Translate friction patterns into scores, risk levels, and an estimated EBITDA exposure range.

04 / ACT

Prioritize Interventions

Prioritize interventions before performance deteriorates. Establish a benchmark for continuous monitoring.

03The Product

A new operating language for organizational performance.

Three proprietary metrics: Organizational Health Score, Execution Friction Index, and EBITDA at Risk, alongside diagnostic views no other platform provides. Oprava gives leadership teams a common language for health, friction, risk, and intervention priority.

P1Assign DRI: Initiative #7 (Product)

04Intelligence Architecture

Built on a proprietary Organizational Health Ontology.

Oprava unifies organizational psychology, management science, systems theory, network science, and strategy execution research into a single scoring architecture that grows more intelligent over time.

The dashboard is the interface. The ontology is the asset.

Every assessment, benchmark, intervention, and outcome strengthens the Oprava model. The asset compounds across companies.

L1
Signal Ingestion Layer
Operating systems, assessments, workflow data, leadership structures
Data
L2
Friction Pattern Ontology
Taxonomy of recurring execution drag across decision, ownership, alignment, coordination
Patterns
L3
Execution Risk Scoring
Composite Health Score, Friction Index, domain-level risk indicators and velocity measures
Scoring
L4
Financial Impact Mapping
Translation of friction risk into EBITDA exposure estimates with confidence ranges
Financial
L5
Intervention Intelligence
Prioritized recommendations calibrated to friction type, severity, and business context
Actions
L6
Benchmarking Intelligence
Cross-company baselines across industries, stages, and transformation contexts
Intelligence
Friction Domains
6
Decision · Ownership · Alignment · Coordination · Leadership · Change
Signal Sources
40+
Operational, structural, behavioral, and financial signals mapped to the ontology
Core Output Metrics
3
Health Score · Friction Index · EBITDA at Risk, all financially grounded
05Use Cases

Built for moments when execution risk matters most.

From PE portfolio monitoring to transformation execution, Oprava delivers execution risk visibility when organizational performance is under the highest pressure.

Private Equity

PE Portfolio Monitoring

Detects
Execution fragility and ownership gaps across portfolio companies before they surface in financials.
Prevents
Value creation plan misses driven by organizational friction rather than strategy failure.
Protects EBITDA targets & exit multiples
M&A / Integration

Post-Acquisition Integration

Detects
Cultural misalignment, decision gaps, and leadership ownership ambiguity during integration.
Prevents
Integration friction compounding into execution breakdown and deal value erosion.
Protects deal value & synergy capture
Transformation

Transformation Execution

Detects
Change readiness decline, strategy-to-execution gaps, and transformation fatigue signals.
Prevents
Strategic initiatives stalling at the organizational layer before visible performance impact.
Protects transformation ROI & timeline
Leadership

Leadership Alignment

Detects
Where leadership intent is not reaching team-level execution, creating bottlenecks and drift.
Prevents
Misalignment between executive intent and operational reality compounding over time.
Protects execution speed & clarity
Operations

Operating Performance

Detects
Coordination overload, duplicated work, and process friction slowing growth and margins.
Prevents
Operational drag becoming a structural drag on EBITDA without a clear diagnosis.
Protects margin & growth velocity
Board / Investor

Board & Investor Visibility

Detects
Organizational risk not visible in financial reporting: fragility, leadership gaps, readiness.
Prevents
Boards being surprised by organizational performance failure after results deteriorate.
Protects enterprise value & confidence
06Differentiation

Not engagement. Not sentiment. Execution risk intelligence.

Oprava is a new category. It is not an HR survey, a BI dashboard, or an engagement tool. It is a continuous execution intelligence layer for CEOs, PE operating partners, and boards.

CapabilityHR SurveysBI DashboardsOprava
Measurement cadencePeriodic / annualContinuous (lag)Continuous intelligence
Signal typeSentiment / perceptionFinancial / operationalExecution friction signals
Financial linkageNonePartial (lagging)EBITDA at Risk estimate
Primary audienceHR / People teamsFinance / OpsCEO · PE · Board
Intervention guidanceNoneNonePrioritized by score
BenchmarkingLimitedVariesCross-company ontology

Oprava does not measure how employees feel. It measures where execution is breaking.

Request a Pilot
07For Private Equity

For PE firms, value creation depends on execution speed.

Portfolio companies don't miss value creation plans because the strategy is wrong. They miss because execution friction compounds faster than leadership can see it.

01

Portfolio-level execution visibility

Monitor Health Scores and Friction Indexes across all portfolio companies from a single view, before results deteriorate.

02

Detect fragility before it's too late

Identify where execution is fragile, where intervention is needed, and where EBITDA may be exposed, weeks or months earlier than financial reporting.

03

Connect organizational health to exit value

Link organizational performance intelligence to the metrics that matter at exit: EBITDA growth, margin improvement, and execution quality.

Built For
CEOs · PE · Boards
Operating partners, portfolio & transformation leaders.
Core Outputs
OHS · EFI · EBITDA at Risk
Three proprietary, financially grounded metrics.
Deployment
Pilot → Portfolio
Start focused, then expand across the portfolio.
09The Process

How the diagnostic works.

Three structured steps. Thirty days. An executive-ready operating view.

01

Map the operating context

Define the company, leadership structure, core initiatives, functions, and execution priorities.

02

Capture friction signals

Collect structured inputs from workflows, leadership assessments, operating rhythms, and available system data.

03

Prioritize action

Translate signals into risk patterns, intervention priorities, and an executive-ready operating view.

08Get Started

Run a 30-Day Execution Diagnostic.

Use a focused Oprava diagnostic to identify hidden execution friction, quantify risk, and prioritize the operating issues most likely to affect performance. Structured, evidence-based, and executive-ready in 30 days.

DELIVERABLE 01

Organizational Health Score

Composite score benchmarked against comparable companies, with domain-level breakdown.

DELIVERABLE 02

Execution Friction Index

A measure of hidden drag across decision, ownership, alignment, coordination, and leadership flow.

DELIVERABLE 03

EBITDA at Risk Estimate

Estimated financial exposure from unresolved friction, with a confidence range and key drivers.

DELIVERABLE 04

Top Friction Patterns

The highest-impact recurring friction signals, ranked by severity and financial exposure.

DELIVERABLE 05

Leadership & Ownership Risk Map

A diagnostic map of decision bottlenecks, ownership ambiguity clusters, and leadership flow gaps.

DELIVERABLE 06

Recommended Interventions

Prioritized actions ranked by Intervention Priority Score, with guidance and a baseline for tracking.

Run a 30-Day DiagnosticTypically scoped and delivered within 3–4 weeks.

Before performance breaks, see the friction.

Oprava helps leaders identify the organizational drag slowing execution before it becomes financial underperformance.
